summary: Verified that the footer email signup form now opens a prefilled mailto to info@wcsbasketball.com using the entered address, and that build and home smoke QA still pass.
checks_run: Reviewed Footer.tsx implementation for the email signup form behavior.
Ran npm run build in the WCS repo.
Ran npm run test:e2e:smoke in the WCS repo.
checks_passed: Footer form onSubmit prevents default and, when an email is entered, sets window.location.href to a mailto:info@wcsbasketball.com link with a subject and the entered email address in the body.
Next.js production build (npm run build) completed successfully after the change.
Playwright home smoke test (npm run test:e2e:smoke) passed after the change.
notes: This implementation is a mailto-based solution: submitting the footer form opens the user's default mail client to send an email to info@wcsbasketball.com with the visitor's address in the email body. It does not store signups in a backend or database.
